pitchSequence.description: Fastball low and outside
Slapped into shallow center, drops in for a base hit

notes: 2-pitch AB, leadoff single to shallow center. Count was 1-0 when put in play. Righty vs righty.

pitchSequence.description: Hammered foul and into the stands
And he fouls another one off
Fastball misses high
Driven to shallow right, drops in for a base hit

notes: 4-pitch AB, single to shallow right. Count was 1-2 when put in play. Runners now on first and second with nobody out.

pitchSequence.description: Slashed foul down the third base line
Curveball misses low
Hit in the air to right-center, Palomar drifting over and makes the catch

notes: 3-pitch AB, flyout to Palomar in right-center. Count was 1-1 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Padolina. Runners hold at first and second.

pitchSequence.description: Slider in the dirt
Fouled back and out of play
Hard grounder up the middle, squeaks through the infield for a base hit. Bradleys scores from second.

notes: 3-pitch AB, RBI single up the middle. Count was 1-1 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Padolina. Bradleys scores from second. Loons on the board, 3-1.

pitchSequence.description: Dribbled foul down the first base line
Fastball misses high
Slow curveball called a strike
Fastball down and in
Fastball misses high, count runs full
Fastball misses low for ball four

notes: 6-pitch AB, walk loads the bases. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Padolina. One out, bases loaded.

pitchSequence.description: Skied foul and out of play
He fouls another one off
Slider down and in
Hard grounder to third, Patterson to second for one, over to first in time. 5-4-3 double play ends the inning.

notes: 4-pitch AB, 5-4-3 double play ends the inning. Count was 1-2 when put in play. Bases were loaded with one out. Loons score one run in the inning. Score now 3-1 Cars.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball misses outside
High fly ball, deep left field, sails over the wall for a home run

notes: 2-pitch AB, solo home run to deep left field. Count was 1-0 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Sanborn. Score now 4-1 Cars.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball misses outside
Fouled back and out of play
Curveball, swung on and missed
Swing and a miss on a high heater, Nakamura is down on strikes

notes: 4-pitch AB, strikeout swinging. Count was 1-2 when struck out. Righty vs righty.

pitchSequence.description: Slider misses low
Chopped through the hole, skips into left field for a base hit

notes: 2-pitch AB, single through the hole to left field. Count was 1-0 when put in play. Righty vs righty.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball misses wide
Fastball called a strike
Another fastball called a strike
Slider off the plate
Bouncing ball to short, Stipe to second for one, over to first in time. 6-4-3 double play ends the inning.

notes: 5-pitch AB, 6-4-3 double play ends the inning. Count was 2-2 when put in play. Cars score one run in the inning on Patterson HR. Score now 4-1 Cars.
